title: Apex Group's Tokeny taps Polygon to debut chain for compliant tokenized RWAs
message_html: Apex Group's Tokeny taps Polygon to debut chain for compliant tokenized RWAs ...
snippet: Apex Group’s Tokeny and Polygon Labs are launching T-REX Ledger, a Polygon-based blockchain that aims to centralize compliance for ERC-3643 security tokens.

title: Tokenized equities market cap reaches $1.5 billion with $600 million growth since start of year
message_html: Tokenized equities market cap reaches $1.5 billion with $600 million growth since start of year ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): The market capitalization of tokenized equities has reached $1.5 billion, increasing by nearly $600 million since the beginning of the year. Among them, xStocks (Solana) has exceeded $800 million in tokenized equities, while Ondo Global Markets (Ethereum, BSC + Solana)
